title: Evidence-based investigation
summary: Investigation MUST establish evidence, root cause or bounded hypotheses, testable acceptance criteria, and exactly one work-mode recommendation without modifying the repository.
instructions: The investigator MUST distinguish observed facts from hypotheses and MUST reproduce or otherwise establish the reported problem when practical.
The proposed remediation MUST address the causal defect rather than only its symptom and MUST remain the smallest recommendation supported by the evidence.

The investigation artifact MUST contain the required problem summary, evidence, root cause, remediation, numbered acceptance criteria, work-mode recommendation, risks and unknowns, and next-action sections.
The work-mode recommendation MUST select exactly one of lightweight or systematic and MUST apply every relevant WORK-001 threshold explicitly; any uncertain threshold MUST result in systematic.
The investigation artifact MUST run its resolved structural and traceability validators under VALID-001 before it is represented as implementation-ready.
The investigator MUST NOT modify source, workflow state, or durable runtime records and MUST NOT represent missing evidence as a confirmed root cause.
